response.overview: # Kaisara  Kaisara comes from a poor family in a small village but manages to secure a good job in the city. She hides her true background from her friends, afraid they will abandon her. One day, her parents come to visit her, but she cruelly refuses to meet them. Nidham witnesses this and decides to bring Kaisara's parents to his home. Unfortunately, Kaisara's father falls ill and passes away that night. From then on, Nidham is determined to teach Kaisara a lesson. Nur Kaisara (Scha Elinnea) is too obsessed with beauty and willing to sacrifice by tightening her belt due to her low salary. She is also a proud person who is disliked by those around her. Only her housemates, Erin and Laila, understand her. At the office, Kaisara has a close friend, Danish, who also harbors feelings for her in secret. Kaisara has a sworn enemy named Julia who always looks for her faults and is willing to seduce Danish just to hurt Kaisara's feelings.
response.title: Hati Tanpa Rasa
